arts.ttl: West Ham Newcomer Discusses the Defining Moment of Departing PSG
arts.sum: Carlos Soler, currently on loan from Paris Saint-Germain to West Ham United, likely realized he needed to leave the capital club this summer to secure regular playing time. After watching Spain win UEFA Euro 2024, the 27-year-old probably wants to get back on La Roja’s radar. arts.ttl: Liverpool and Man City Join PSG in Pursuit of Chelsea Summer Target, Report Says
arts.sum: Samu Omorodion has made a remarkable start to the 2024-25 season with FC Porto, netting seven goals in seven appearances across all competitions. His impressive performance has reportedly caught the attention of several top European clubs.
